$comment: GENERIC SALON SEED — the reusable shape for ANY salon on the Portal Salon Platform. Copy to data/seeds/<your-salon>.json, fill with REAL data (cite your sources in 'sources'), and point your deployment at it. The deploy seeder loads every *.json in SEED_DIR (default ./data/seeds), validates against the identity-type schemas (spec §6), and writes each salon + team + services into NEDB with provenance (caused_by → this file's hash). Campaign configs reference salons by handle (e.g. orlando's anchorSalonHandle: 'mint-on-the-avenue'). Everything here is DATA, not code: titles, categories, price formats, and promos are free-form — your salon's own taxonomy fits without touching the platform.

sources.$comment: Where each section's facts came from — live site URLs, GBP, or 'owner-provided'. Real data only; never invented.

brands: product lines carried — e.g. Aveda, Redken, Oribe
entity.locationNotes: landmarks / parking / how to find the door

positioning.tagline: one line that IS the brand
positioning.philosophy: the paragraph that explains why this salon exists

entity.serviceInclusions: what EVERY service includes (consultation, rituals, massage...)
entity.stylistLevels: optional: describe your pricing-tier system (e.g. 'Level 1-8 artists — prices are starting rates')

team.$comment: Titles are free-form DATA — your taxonomy, not our enum. 'roles' are slugs for filtering/rendering; 'level' optionally maps a member onto YOUR pricing tiers; 'isProvider' controls team-grid + bookable rendering — anyone who takes clients (stylists, colorists, nail technicians, estheticians) is true; owners/managers/assistants who don't take their own clients set false.
team.name: Full Name
team.title: Master Stylist / Color Director / Junior Stylist / General Manager — whatever is true

services.$comment: Categories are free-form keys — mirror how YOUR menu is organized. Prices are strings to preserve honest formats: '65-90+', 'from $180', 'hourly', 'complimentary'. 'group' optionally sub-organizes within a category.

your-category-slug.source: which source URL this table came from

promotions.name: e.g. New Guest 20% off
promotions.valid_from: optional ISO date — engine schedules go-live

faqs.a: the answer in the salon's voice

discrepanciesFoundOnLiveSources.$comment: When your own sources disagree (site vs GBP vs print), record it here instead of silently picking — the platform renders canonical data, and this list is your fix-it queue.

toConfirmWithOwner: anything the crawl couldn't verify — booking URL, socials, roster, canonical prices
